name: zerror_init_output_context
description: zError::InitOutputContext clears the legacy output byte counter, stores the output byte cap, stores the target HWND, ignores the stripped log-file argument, and returns success.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 27 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies success return, stored HWND, stored max-byte cap, and cleared output byte counter.
